title: [BUG] Crash open file if it have table and comment
author: MavlinD
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

A book is corrupt

Lib version: 4.2.0

## Steps To Reproduce

```javascript
  worksheet.addTable({
    name: 'MyTable',
    ref: 'B3',
    headerRow: true,
    totalsRow: true,
    style: {
      theme: 'TableStyleDark3',
      showRowStripes: true,
    },
    columns: [
      { name: 'Date', totalsRowLabel: 'Totals:', filterButton: true },
      { name: 'Amount', totalsRowFunction: 'sum', filterButton: false },
    ],
    rows: [
      [new Date('2019-07-20'), 70.1],
      [new Date('2019-07-21'), 70.6],
      [new Date('2019-07-22'), 70.1],
    ],
  })

worksheet.getCell('A1').note = 'Hello, ExcelJS!';

```

## The expected behaviour:

can`t correct open file in MS Excel

## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

```javascript

```
